name: Imtiyaz Ibrahim
title: Network Operation Center Engineer
tagline: Monitoring Networks Today, Securing the Cloud Tomorrow
description: NOC Engineer with experience in network monitoring and incident management, aspiring to build a career in Cyber Security and Cloud Security. Passionate about securing systems, analyzing threats, and continuously learning new technologies to protect modern digital environments.

about.summary: Currently working as a NOC Engineer, I have hands-on experience in network monitoring, incident management, and ensuring system uptime. I am passionate about transitioning into Cybersecurity and Cloud Security, with a strong interest in protecting systems and data in modern IT environments.
paragraphs: I have a solid foundation in networking concepts, troubleshooting, and real-time monitoring of infrastructure. My role involves identifying issues, resolving incidents, and maintaining network performance to meet SLA requirements.

I am actively building my skills in Cybersecurity and Cloud technologies, exploring areas like network security, threat detection, and cloud infrastructure. I am committed to continuous learning through certifications and practical labs.

When I'm not working, I focus on upgrading my technical knowledge, learning new tools, and staying updated with industry trends. I am eager to grow in the field of Cybersecurity and Cloud Security and open to opportunities that align with my career goals.

contact.title: Let's Work Together
contact.description: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? I'd love to hear from you. Fill out the form below or reach out through any of the channels.
